content.en:
Soon after, the Lord of the Yuan Gu brought Ye Tian to the Origin Inheritance.

And the location of this inheritance place made Ye Tian a little surprised.

"One of the forbidden places in the universe, the land of the gods!"

Ye Tian looked at the area of blood mist in front of him and said in shock.

He didn't know much about the Godfall Land, but at least he knew a little bit of information, such as the fact that this Godfall Land was a treasure land at the beginning, a treasure land that shocked the universe.

A long time ago, many top-level elixirs and even Chaos Treasures were born in the Land of Godfall, and the Land of Godfall had its own realm, which greatly suppressed cultivators, but the Land of Godfall was indeed too strange.

During the period when the innate gods were still in charge of the universe, many innate gods and acquired gods fought here, and after a long period of fighting, many gods fell here, and their bodies were compatible with the land of gods, and even changed the rules of the land of gods.

Gradually, the land of Godfall became more dangerous, and the chaotic will permeated the entire land of Godfall, if the supreme with a weak will and soul, once he entered the land of Godfall, he would also fall into a state of madness, or even fall in the land of Godfall.

And due to the change of rules, it is difficult for the land of Godfall to give birth to top-notch elixirs and supreme treasures, so this is no longer a treasure land, but a forbidden place.

"Lord of the Ancient Ages, the source is in the land of the gods, hasn't it been discovered a long time ago, why haven't I heard of it?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu explained: "Ten Thousand Laws Supreme, the source land is indeed in the land of the gods, and the formation of the land of the gods should be formed by the leakage of the power of the source land. At the beginning, in the First Universe Era, an area similar to a treasure land was formed, and although the universe was destroyed again and again, the position would not change. I memorized the coordinates of the universe, and I can't be mistaken. As for why no one found out, it was because they were not strong enough. Without the strength of a first-class supreme, it would not attract the attention of the source at all. If you want to enter the source place, you can only have the source land take the initiative to move you in, otherwise you won't be able to find the source place at all!"

"Where did it come from?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"I don't know!" the Lord of the Ancient Ages shook his head, "I always feel that the Source Land should not be considered a inheritance, because the Source Land does not have any inheritance, there are only benefits. I didn't find any owner in the source, at least not in the way. Like the Qilin Hall has Qilin Allah, this is obviously known, but the source place is very strange, more like a place of trial, a place of cultivation. Anyway, you'll know when you go in!"

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

No matter how much the Lord of the Yuan Gu said, it is better to enter and experience it for himself.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian stepped into the land of the gods, and the infinite chaotic will rushed in, and the bloody qi also turned into all kinds of divine weapons to attack.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian snorted coldly, and his momentum directly dispersed these bloody aura, and that chaotic will could not help Ye Tian at all.

Suddenly.

A wave of attraction came, Ye Tian did not resist, and was directly sucked into the source.

......

Source.

An ancient expanse of land.

Ye Tian appeared here, and he was ready to use the Life Heavenly Pupil to check the surrounding situation at the first time, but the next moment he was dumbfounded.

"Where's my Life Celestial Pupil?"

Ye Tian found that he had lost this ability, and then found that his divine sense was gone, his soul was very weak, he couldn't seem to sense it, and his body was extremely weak, as if he was far inferior to the god level.

And the monstrous divine power has disappeared, the talents cannot be used one by one, and the rules cannot be sensed.

At this moment, he seems to be an ordinary cultivator, too weak and too weak!

"Sure enough, the Lord of the Yuan Gu said that once you enter the source land, almost all means cannot be used, and those supernatural powers, martial arts moves, and all kinds of secret techniques are useless!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, he found that he couldn't even open the Void Mina Realm and the Small Universe.

It didn't work without a weapon, Ye Tian hurriedly cut down a tree from nearby and made a wooden knife.

This wooden knife is very strong, and it can be considered a weapon.

"The source has the rules of the source land, and there are martial arts that belong to the source land, I must adapt to the rules here, otherwise I won't be able to survive at all. According to the Lord of the Yuangu, there will be one source person after another in the source land, and the more source people you kill, the greater the harvest. You can also take the initiative to find the source people and hunt the source people yourself. Hiding is useless, and once killed by the source, it is equivalent to failing the assessment. The original Lord of the Protogens had only been in the Source Land for a hundred years before failing. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

The source people who appeared near him at the beginning couldn't be too strong, otherwise he was bound to fail.

"Divine Sense, Soul Power, and Life Heavenly Pupil can't be used, and it's difficult to sense the surrounding situation, but the copy talent should be able to be used, right?"

Ye Tian guessed.

Immediately, he tried to turn on the talent for copying.

Airplanes!

The power of the Copying Talent enveloped this area, and although the coverage area was not large, it also had a range of tens of miles.

"The copying talent is really awesome, and there is no way to completely block the source!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

With the ability to copy the talent's probe, his life-saving ability has increased greatly!

Within a range of dozens of miles, Ye Tian found that there were a total of three source people, each in three directions.

"Try one of the sources first!"

Ye Tian rushed towards one of the source people, and soon came to the front of this source person.

Under the view of the copy talent, the talent of this source person has long been seen by Ye Tian, but the talent of the source person is very strange.

No cultivation talent, no speed talent, no defense talent.

The three source people, each with a talent, the three talents are-

【Source Knife Talent: Elementary】

【Source Talent: Elementary】

【Source Fire Talent: Elementary】

From the name, these three talents seem to be related to knives, speed, and fire, but they are somewhat different.

"Copy it first!"

Ye Tian copied all three talents.

And at this moment, the source man he found was the source man with the talent of source speed.

Ye Tian saw this source person, who was similar to a human being, but his eyes were white and exuded a demonic aura.

This source man held a spear in his hand, with a bronze luster, which was many times better than the wooden knife in Ye Tian's hand.

Shout!

The other party rushed over, very fast, and silent, the spear in his hand stabbed fiercely, there was no move to speak of, just one word - fast!

The other party's physical fitness should be similar to Ye Tian at the moment, although Ye Tian can't use talent, supernatural powers, laws and all kinds of mastery, it doesn't mean that there are no means at all.

Some basic moves can still be cast, otherwise they won't even be able to beat a single source person.

If there really is nothing, the original Lord of the Yuan Gu may not be able to kill even a single source person, and he will directly fail.

Ye Tian reacted quickly, picked off the opponent's spear with a wooden knife, shook his body, and fought in close quarters.

Although this source man was very fast, much faster than Ye Tian, he didn't have much combat experience, and he was quickly killed by Ye Tian easily.

After all, he was just a weak source person, and Ye Tiannai was a god-level powerhouse, no matter how weakened he was, he wouldn't be able to deal with an ant.

"At the beginning, the source people should just be a benefit to familiarize the assessor with the changes in the body and slowly transform their combat power, but for me, this benefit is of little use. I'd better fuse the three talents first, all the original talents were blocked, but the talents in this source can be used directly. Haha, in this case, for me, this source is not difficult at all!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, he began to merge the three talents.
